003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server;
018
019import static java.lang.annotation.RetentionPolicy.*;
020
021import java.lang.annotation.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.marshall.encoders.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.converter.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.guard.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.logger.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor.*;
031
032/**
033 * Rich mixin definition for the {@link Rest#mixinDefs() @Rest(mixinDefs=...)} attribute.
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * Declares a mixin class <b>and</b> lets the <i>host</i> override selected {@code @Rest}-level settings for
037 * that mixin's mixed-in endpoints &mdash; in one place, without subclassing or editing the mixin class.  This
038 * is the host-side complement to {@link Rest#mixins() @Rest(mixins=...)} (which takes bare classes and offers
039 * no override hook).
040 *
041 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
042 * <p class='bjava'>
043 *    <ja>@Rest</ja>(
044 *       mixinDefs=<ja>@Mixin</ja>(type=FooMixin.<jk>class</jk>, guards=AdminGuard.<jk>class</jk>)
045 *    )
046 *    <jk>public class</jk> MyResource { ... }
047 * </p>
048 *
049 * <p>
050 * Here {@code AdminGuard} is applied to {@code FooMixin}'s endpoints as declared by the host, without
051 * {@code FooMixin} having to declare it.
052 *
053 * <h5 class='section'>Override semantics</h5>
054 * <p>
055 * The override slots mirror the same {@code @Rest} attributes and resolve through the existing host&rarr;mixin
056 * inheritance chain, exactly as if the value had been declared on the mixin class itself, but at the
057 * most-derived position so a host override wins over the mixin class's own same-property declaration:
058 * <ul>
059 *    <li><b>List-shaped</b> ({@code guards}, {@code converters}, {@code encoders}, {@code serializers},
060 *       {@code parsers}, {@code responseProcessors}, {@code restOpArgs}, default headers/attributes,
061 *       {@code produces}/{@code consumes}) &mdash; appended after the host chain that the mixin inherits.
062 *    <li><b>Replace-shaped</b> ({@code callLogger}, {@code partSerializer}, {@code partParser}, {@code debug},
063 *       {@code defaultAccept}/{@code defaultContentType}/{@code defaultCharset}, {@code maxInput},
064 *       {@code roleGuard}/{@code rolesDeclared}, {@code messages}) &mdash; the host override wins when set.
065 * </ul>
066 *
067 * <p>
068 * {@link #noInherit()} is the {@code @Mixin}'s own inheritance-cutoff list, applied to this mixin's
069 * sub-context: a token here cuts the host&rarr;mixin inheritance walk for that property (same token set as
070 * {@link Rest#noInherit()}).  The host override is authoritative <i>but</i> overridable by these
071 * {@code noInherit} rules &mdash; e.g. {@code @Mixin(type=X.class, noInherit="guards")} removes the host's
072 * guard chain from {@code X}'s endpoints entirely.
073 *
074 * <p>
075 * {@link #path()}/{@link #paths()} re-mount the mixin's endpoints under host-chosen prefix(es).
076 *
077 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
078 *    <li class='ja'>{@link Rest#mixinDefs()}
079 *    <li class='ja'>{@link Rest#mixins()}
080 * </ul>
081 *
082 * @since 10.0.0
083 */
084@Target({})
085@Retention(RUNTIME)
086public @interface Mixin {
087
088   /**
089    * The mixin class to compose into the host resource.
090    *
091    * <p>
092    * Required.  Equivalent to a bare entry in {@link Rest#mixins()}, but with the override slots below.
093    *
094    * @return The mixin class.
095    */
096   Class<?> type();
097
098   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
099   // Override slots — mirror the corresponding @Rest attribute signatures.
100   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
101
102   /**
103    * Host-declared {@link Rest#guards() guards} override for this mixin's endpoints (appended after the host chain).
104    *
105    * @return The annotation value.
106    */
107   Class<? extends RestGuard>[] guards() default {};
108
109   /**
110    * Host-declared {@link Rest#roleGuard() roleGuard} override for this mixin's endpoints.
111    *
112    * @return The annotation value.
113    */
114   String roleGuard() default "";
115
116   /**
117    * Host-declared {@link Rest#rolesDeclared() rolesDeclared} override for this mixin's endpoints.
118    *
119    * @return The annotation value.
120    */
121   String rolesDeclared() default "";
122
123   /**
124    * Host-declared {@link Rest#converters() converters} override for this mixin's endpoints.
125    *
126    * @return The annotation value.
127    */
128   Class<? extends RestConverter>[] converters() default {};
129
130   /**
131    * Host-declared {@link Rest#encoders() encoders} override for this mixin's endpoints.
132    *
133    * @return The annotation value.
134    */
135   Class<? extends Encoder>[] encoders() default {};
136
137   /**
138    * Host-declared {@link Rest#serializers() serializers} override for this mixin's endpoints.
139    *
140    * @return The annotation value.
141    */
142   Class<? extends Serializer>[] serializers() default {};
143
144   /**
145    * Host-declared {@link Rest#parsers() parsers} override for this mixin's endpoints.
146    *
147    * @return The annotation value.
148    */
149   Class<?>[] parsers() default {};
150
151   /**
152    * Host-declared {@link Rest#responseProcessors() responseProcessors} override for this mixin's endpoints.
153    *
154    * @return The annotation value.
155    */
156   Class<? extends ResponseProcessor>[] responseProcessors() default {};
157
158   /**
159    * Host-declared {@link Rest#restOpArgs() restOpArgs} override for this mixin's endpoints.
160    *
161    * @return The annotation value.
162    */
163   Class<? extends RestOpArg>[] restOpArgs() default {};
164
165   /**
166    * Host-declared {@link Rest#callLogger() callLogger} override for this mixin's endpoints.
167    *
168    * @return The annotation value.
169    */
170   Class<? extends CallLogger> callLogger() default CallLogger.Void.class;
171
172   /**
173    * Host-declared {@link Rest#partSerializer() partSerializer} override for this mixin's endpoints.
174    *
175    * @return The annotation value.
176    */
177   Class<? extends HttpPartSerializer> partSerializer() default HttpPartSerializer.Void.class;
178
179   /**
180    * Host-declared {@link Rest#partParser() partParser} override for this mixin's endpoints.
181    *
182    * @return The annotation value.
183    */
184   Class<? extends HttpPartParser> partParser() default HttpPartParser.Void.class;
185
186   /**
187    * Host-declared {@link Rest#debug() debug} override for this mixin's endpoints.
188    *
189    * @return The annotation value.
190    */
191   Debug debug() default @Debug;
192
193   /**
194    * Host-declared {@link Rest#messages() messages} override for this mixin's endpoints.
195    *
196    * @return The annotation value.
197    */
198   String messages() default "";
199
200   /**
201    * Host-declared {@link Rest#defaultRequestHeaders() defaultRequestHeaders} override for this mixin's endpoints.
202    *
203    * @return The annotation value.
204    */
205   String[] defaultRequestHeaders() default {};
206
207   /**
208    * Host-declared {@link Rest#defaultResponseHeaders() defaultResponseHeaders} override for this mixin's endpoints.
209    *
210    * @return The annotation value.
211    */
212   String[] defaultResponseHeaders() default {};
213
214   /**
215    * Host-declared {@link Rest#defaultRequestAttributes() defaultRequestAttributes} override for this mixin's endpoints.
216    *
217    * @return The annotation value.
218    */
219   String[] defaultRequestAttributes() default {};
220
221   /**
222    * Host-declared {@link Rest#produces() produces} override for this mixin's endpoints.
223    *
224    * @return The annotation value.
225    */
226   String[] produces() default {};
227
228   /**
229    * Host-declared {@link Rest#consumes() consumes} override for this mixin's endpoints.
230    *
231    * @return The annotation value.
232    */
233   String[] consumes() default {};
234
235   /**
236    * Host-declared {@link Rest#defaultAccept() defaultAccept} override for this mixin's endpoints.
237    *
238    * @return The annotation value.
239    */
240   String defaultAccept() default "";
241
242   /**
243    * Host-declared {@link Rest#defaultContentType() defaultContentType} override for this mixin's endpoints.
244    *
245    * @return The annotation value.
246    */
247   String defaultContentType() default "";
248
249   /**
250    * Host-declared {@link Rest#defaultCharset() defaultCharset} override for this mixin's endpoints.
251    *
252    * @return The annotation value.
253    */
254   String defaultCharset() default "";
255
256   /**
257    * Host-declared {@link Rest#maxInput() maxInput} override for this mixin's endpoints.
258    *
259    * @return The annotation value.
260    */
261   String maxInput() default "";
262
263   /**
264    * Host-chosen single mount prefix for this mixin's endpoints (re-mount).
265    *
266    * @return The annotation value.
267    */
268   String path() default "";
269
270   /**
271    * Host-chosen multi-mount prefixes for this mixin's endpoints (re-mount).
272    *
273    * @return The annotation value.
274    */
275   String[] paths() default {};
276
277   /**
278    * Inheritance-cutoff list for this mixin's sub-context.
279    *
280    * <p>
281    * Each token names a property whose host&rarr;mixin inheritance walk is cut for this mixin (same token set
282    * as {@link Rest#noInherit()}).  Authoritative over the host override slots above.
283    *
284    * @return The annotation value.
285    */
286   String[] noInherit() default {};
287}
